commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human review is needed because this PR adds public Plugin SDK surface, has a trust-boundary code finding, and must be rebased against current sessions_send safeguards before merge.; Needs attention: Security review needs attention because sanitized hook task metadata still trusts caller-supplied requester identity.; Review finding: [P1] Keep requester metadata host-owned — src/agents/tools/sessions-send-tool.... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a typed `sessions_send` plugin hook and SDK exports, routes `sessions_send` through direct or delegated plugin handling, documents the hook, refreshes the SDK API baseline, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +382, Tests +332, Docs +4, Generated 0. Total +718 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows `params.task.requester.sessionKey/channel` copied into the sanitized hook task before host-owned defaults; current main lacks this hook, so this is a proposed API defect rather than a shipped current-main bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because this PR adds public Plugin SDK surface, has a trust-boundary code finding, and must be rebased against current `sessions_send` safeguards before merge.

target.title: fix: harden sessions_send delegated announce trust
target.body:
## 요약
- clawsweeper P1/P2 지적 대응: `sessions_send` delegated announce 경로에서 caller-supplied `task.runtime.roundOneReply`를 신뢰하지 않도록 제거했습니다.
- delegated announce/ping-pong seed는 plugin-owned `dispatch.roundOneReply` 또는 core가 reply-history wait/read로 검증한 reply만 사용하도록 trust boundary를 고정했습니다.
- `sessions_send` hook 호출을 core reply-history snapshot/read보다 앞에 두어 hook-owned delivery가 로컬 세션 history 가정에 의해 차단되지 않도록 했습니다.

## 테스트
- `pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-send-tool.a2a.test.ts` → 2 files / 20 tests passed
- `NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` → OK `docs/.generated/plugin-sdk-api-baseline.sha256`
- `pnpm tsgo:core && pnpm build:plugin-sdk:dts` → passed
- commit hook의 `pnpm check`는 `tsgo:extensions:test` 진행 중 세션 timeout/SIGTERM으로 중단되어, 위 targeted gate와 SDK/type gate를 별도 확보했습니다.

## 리스크
- 기존 PR #68622의 fork branch에 직접 push하지 않고 방통 replacement patch branch로 열었습니다. maintainer가 기존 PR에 cherry-pick하거나 이 PR을 기준으로 이어갈 수 있습니다.
target.author: jinon86
